textByHash.0e39357c3dc03279b18d451391918ff01dd7e74d: Ooh... tricky stuff. Took me YEARS to get that rank.
textByHash.7a31cee3066a90234153cf0a15094fbb5ebb2a5d: Well, what some of the more aspiring thieves in our gang are working on right now is to steal some very valuable candlesticks from Scarface Pete - the pirate leader on Karamja.
textByHash.cea40690ed46fd67e55a6fef5816d48f64c44dd5: His security is excellent, and the target very valuable so that might be enough to get you the rank.
textByHash.57567b42a6ddf56f0c20c515c6782cdb987ca5bd: Go talk to our man Alfonse, the waiter in the Shrimp and Parrot.
textByHash.6a8250a995a4671dccf8027f5a798029d80b6f37: Use the secret word 'gherkin' to show you're one of us.
textByHash.a2b1d092eff8e676525ea6471662c17ffee2c59c: You told me you wanted to get a Master thief's armband! Now pay attention.
textByHash.74396d540b18e70fa6b7d4b11b23d5e69a847833: Some of the more aspiring thieves in our gang are working on right now is to steal some very valuable candlesticks from Scarface Pete - the pirate leader on Karamja.
textByHash.6479ea4e147e4666b5803c4850df9a3e73945b36: Well, in all honesty, you didn't actually retrieve it yourself, did you? You don't qualify as a master thief unless you actually steal it yourself, you know...
textByHash.7e79cddd4d9b1bf357fab4b5b735d976eca042f9: Hmmm. Not bad, not bad. Let's see it, make sure it's genuine.
textByHash.fbe626d3ce3ecb9533971236a0a6733203c5399b: Aww, go on then. I suppose I'm in a generous mood today.
textByHash.aa839c6828cc442281d4212263d086abe2348316: Lucky for you I have a spare. Don't lose it again!
textByHash.a105f195b1640733c45f0ef75578ecc93ec53282: You stay away from here! Black Arm dog!
textByHash.91225430dc928391f1e9749a34078eb6d1ca7ae4: Hey! You can't go in there. Only authorised personnel of the VTAM Corporation are allowed beyond this point.
textByHash.6e977a535d930d841853ed0808c25a44dfe3968c: No, this is a legitimate business run by legitimate businessmen.
textByHash.b324d1457c84c392938c2db6cf6baf396e95fc5b: Supposing we were this crime gang however, what would you want with us?
textByHash.99ed6785ebc5be5d78d2acab2b2b0f6069022314: You mean you'd like to join the Phoenix Gang?
textByHash.62658d3fc81bfad86225bb2d6428d3d6a6474491: Well, obviously I can't speak for them, but the Phoenix Gang doesn't let people join just like that.
textByHash.84824c38e30ddad6eb9d0e267adbff8d3c0bd16c: You can't be too careful, you understand.
textByHash.c8814abeb8420ce791a75e4753b861800ce194c8: Generally someone has to prove their loyalty before they can join.
textByHash.4875c2b299c9cd1960040c73752c78519e815908: Obviously, I would have no idea about that.
textByHash.1a02836bde6101a096e2e6de42256f180195bc7c: Although having said that, a rival gang of ours, er, theirs, called the Black Arm Gang is supposedly meeting a contact from Port Sarim today in the Blue Moon Inn.
textByHash.e704eaaa821c232d948b71ff6285da724d683cb8: The Blue Moon Inn is just by the south entrance to this city, and supposedly the name of the contact is Jonny the Beard.
textByHash.0607e288f98eee54d2f9bca174ef967e63c02308: OBVIOUSLY I know NOTHING about the dealings of the Phoenix Gang, but I bet if SOMEBODY were to kill him and bring back his intelligence report, they would be considered loyal enough to join.
textByHash.15792b6204e093f8af8a5d1c73fc75a5fa34922c: Well, then get lost and stop wasting my time.
textByHash.da14d7f8ba39d3db3df3bd102bbba82ffbf8dfd6: ...if you know what's good for you.
textByHash.518187a84ef46ea5ae481dc15db61b366837700c: Get a copy of the Varrock Herald. If we have any positions right now, they'll be advertised in there.
textByHash.952d80aae58fbe69ff531f0670f9271b87c06a79: You need to kill Jonny the Beard, who should be in the Blue Moon Inn.
textByHash.dd645a624ec38619836e2d9322937c046285e64f: ...I would guess. Not being a member of the Phoenix Gang and all.
textByHash.6816c9b870fe322d59bde467ef4b09a7bfc95124: Yes. Yes, this is very good. Very well, then! You can join the Phoenix Gang! I am Straven, one of the gang leaders.
textByHash.f84da12217cd330400efeaa471946c9dfaee585c: You now have access to the inner sanctum of our subterranean hideout, and our weapons supply depot round the front of this building.
textByHash.2652f47b05ae83c5981ce50a7bfcebc19b984e4e: Oh yeah, we've all stolen some stuff in our time. Those candlesticks down here, for example, were quite a challenge to get out of the palace.
textByHash.391be7158bdd53e399a63ececb4da078a5febce4: Woah... that's a blast from the past! We stole that years and years ago! We don't even have all the shield anymore.
textByHash.9369a2c25c62500124e14808bac895a8ff663a05: About five years ago we had a massive fight in our gang and the shield got broken in half during that fight.
textByHash.184db92c09776c4910664e9a1656cce6511b96a7: Shortly after that fight some gang members decided they didn't want to be part of our gang anymore. So they split off to form their own gang.
textByHash.9343235113a37e5a31f5b97b3f49dcb1c352dcae: On their way out they looted what treasures they could from us - which included one of the halves of the shield. We've been rivals with the Black Arms ever since.
textByHash.6ae3c18906e168f2ab94b4ccc75acdbf92c5deb4: You can always try the marketplace in Ardougne. LOTS of opportunity there!
textByHash.86e35e6b649d24547c87ceceeb4e3c3f53daede5: That would be a little tricky; their security is pretty good.
textByHash.31c1e828a315b04f8369008447bf8af32a9c0a28: Not as good as ours, obviously.
textByHash.e971c5a7498e1ce21a9077638544b328a42581ab: If you really want to go there, it's in the alleyway to the west as you come in the south gate.
textByHash.4d2e6f5661c3a72c6f0f1084080a6209fed99504: One of our operatives is often near the alley - a red haired tramp, goes by the name of Charlie. He may be able to give you some ideas.
textByHash.6c3e8ed1fd5f3e65e8a79caa23ecce8c435393b1: You really need to be more careful. We don't want that key falling into the wrong hands. Ah well... Have this spare. Don't lose THIS one.
textByHash.c41a23f3ce1413125bad2e791366cbb37336ed8f: Stay away from here! Black Arm dog!
textByHash.63be4bb30ad46d4ddc7616c971714c9b1bc9a8da: You can't go in there. Only authorised personnel of the VTAM Corporation are allowed beyond this point.
textByHash.80051341ed649771c73b689c88bec71a888ccea1: Really? Well? Who are we then?
textByHash.78a5f7a7e220647a7ca931b4b41235db3d5ccdce: No, this is a legitimate business run by legitimate individuals. However... supposing we were this crime gang, what would you want with us?
textByHash.ce6e58597b800a384c566e020c7d59b42228b4ab: You mean you'd like to join the Phoenix Gang? Well, obviously I can't speak for them, but the Phoenix Gang doesn't let people join just like that. First, you'd need to prove your loyalty.
textByHash.87595bce61f804a780ccbc066f0e2218c14e0ab6: Obviously, I would have no idea. Although, having said that, a rival gang of ours, er, theirs, called the Black Arm Gang is supposedly meeting a contact from Port Sarim today.
textByHash.14732aa877cdd3356f58ce44452df8e06392de51: Apparently the meeting is going to take place in the Blue Moon Inn, and supposedly the contact is none other than the notorious mass murderer turned pirate captain, Jonny the Beard.
textByHash.e791c9630b5ea4e6fcedf7d53e09ff7d05b86f30: Now, obviously I know nothing about the dealings of the Phoenix Gang, but I bet if somebody were to arrange an accident for Jonny and bring back his intelligence report, the gang would be very pleased.
textByHash.77093e47c4dc931133e3864d64806e58a6577c76: Well then get lost and stop wasting my time.
textByHash.d87612fed7d4965a5df7dbdea94b47aeba0690d1: Jonny the Beard is the person who has it. I imagine he will be in the Blue Moon Inn... Not that I'd know for sure, with me definitely not being a member of the Phoenix Gang and all.
textByHash.5d275b21d719feb3c83e289cca5b6c9ef727d19c: Very good... Very good... Okay, I'm satisfied. Welcome to the Phoenix Gang! I'm Straven, one of the gang leaders.
textByHash.1d5eb8076f5780567e22347bfd48fec8b529a914: As a member of our gang, you now have access to our hideout and our weapons supply depot. The hideout is just through this door and the depot is two doors down from here. You'll need this key to get in.
textByHash.2269a274e9bf8249f4455f5a05582ef4eff9fbbf: Once again, welcome to the Phoenix Gang!
textByHash.c58bd0500310dee2921521e6acc68867812d01e8: Oh yeah, we've all stolen some stuff in our time. Our candlesticks down here, for example, were quite a challenge to get out of the palace.
textByHash.98edb84807973e4c2c2d4e2c99fe3a3a441de275: Woah... that's a blast from the past! We stole that years and years ago!
textByHash.fc4e5ad21c4442a40036cd97b1b08fba1248fbe6: Truth be told, we don't even have the whole shield anymore. A few years ago there was a big fight within the gang and the shield got broken in half as a result.
textByHash.d43a78284e33b9baa08184df3f611dd888932061: After the fight, some gang members split off and formed their own group. They took one half of the shield with them.
textByHash.650d2c2c313ff018c5e75c832873fafcf648420b: You could always try the marketplace over in Ardougne. Lots of opportunity there!
textByHash.03dca42b687095218d8a40120f55d461c438dcf2: Interested in spying on the enemy, are you? It will be tricky. Their security is pretty good. Not as good as ours obviously, but still good.
textByHash.67209b4e8c1d85c950e0f84d3736eb0aa65c1e07: Still, if you really want to go there, it's down an alleyway near the southern gate. One of our contacts, a tramp going by the name of Charlie, keeps an eye on it. He may be able to help you.
textByHash.4b8e2a56eb02984454755f5855e889871fc71ead: You really need to be more careful. We don't want that key falling into the wrong hands. Have this spare, but don't lose it this time!
textByHash.664ccb733a9d2088bd23de2987615d56b5c04321: Once one of our most prized possessions.
textByHash.0b82cc524d2c8ad0d43c5b868c61d09e9b515446: It seems the Black Arm Gang weren't content with having one half. They recently stole the other half of the shield from us as well!
